notes: bit_string_position reuses the bit-string-aware position route and returns one-based bit position
bit_string_substring reuses the bit-string-aware substring route and returns deterministic bit slice bytes
bare show_trgm is admitted to the canonical scalar route and refuses with exact invalid-input diagnostic at runtime
show_trgm(text) returns a deterministic JSON text array of unique trigrams
show_trgm(text) propagates SQL NULL input as SQL NULL array
pg_trgm reports deterministic native scalar capability metadata without donor or plugin execution
